rdw.source: Elevated RDW can indicate increased red blood cell production variability, which can be seen in early T1D.

hgb.source: Anemia is a common finding in T1D due to chronic inflammation and impaired erythropoiesis.

hct.source: Low HCT is a sign of anemia, which is common in T1D.

wbc.source: Elevated WBC count can indicate infection or inflammation, which can be associated with T1D.

plt.source: Thrombocytosis can be seen in T1D due to increased platelet production.

mcv.source: Microcytosis (low MCV) can be a sign of iron deficiency anemia, which can occur in T1D.

mch.source: Low MCH indicates smaller red blood cells, which can be seen in iron deficiency anemia.

mchc.source: Low MCHc indicates decreased hemoglobin concentration per cell, which can be seen in iron deficiency anemia.

rbc.source: Low RBC count is a sign of anemia, which is common in T1D.
